title: Enhance vendor category assignment and discovery

requirements.text: Normalize and de-duplicate vendor categories on write in the backend (createVendor and updateVendorProfile) so stored vendor categories are consistent regardless of casing/extra whitespace.
acceptanceCriteria: When createVendor is called with categories that differ only by casing and/or extra whitespace, only one normalized category is stored.
When updateVendorProfile is called with categories that include leading/trailing spaces or multiple internal spaces, the stored categories are trimmed and whitespace-collapsed.
Backend rejects any empty/whitespace-only category entries with a clear error (trap message).

requirements.text: Refine backend category filtering for listPublicVendorsByCategory so category matching is consistent with the frontend’s normalization rules and does not rely on substring matching.
acceptanceCriteria: Filtering by category returns vendors whose stored categories match the requested category using case-insensitive, whitespace-normalized equality.
Filtering by category does not return vendors solely due to partial/substring matches (e.g., filtering "Art" does not match "Martial Arts" unless that is an exact normalized category).

requirements.text: Improve the vendor category selection UX in the VendorCategoryInput component so suggestions are easier to discover and keyboard navigation is more resilient.
acceptanceCriteria: When the category input receives focus, the suggestions dropdown can appear even when the input is empty (showing up to the configured max suggestions), and it still filters as the user types.
ArrowUp/ArrowDown navigation visibly highlights the selected suggestion, and Enter adds the highlighted suggestion when one is selected.
Escape closes the suggestions dropdown and clears the highlighted suggestion index.
Clicking outside the dropdown closes it, without removing any already-selected category badges.

constraints: Backend must remain a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo (no additional backend services).

Do not edit frontend immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui (compose these components instead).
Use English for any user-facing text.
nonGoals: Do not add third-party authentication providers (only Internet Identity is supported).
Do not introduce external databases or non-Motoko backend code.
Do not implement real-time updates (no WebSockets/push).
